DEMURRER
Off Calendar Apr-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ANGELO ARCILLA'S DEMURRER. Appearances: Nora Bustos and Jorge Bustos, Plaintiffs in Pro Per appearing. Plaintiffs failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Sustained, ten days leave to amend. No Opposition Filed. (302CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
